style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, structured card layout, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background.overlay: subtle orthogonal grid pattern of thin straight lines at very low opacity (2-3%), spaced 60px apart horizontally and vertically, matching the website's signature blueprint-style background grid — no hexagonal, no diagonal, strictly rectangular

headline.position: top center, above the main illustration
headline.style: clean geometric sans-serif, tight letter-spacing (-0.04em), matching the website's heading style exactly
headline.size: extra large, dominant headline, approximately 15-20% of image height
headline.effects: none — clean white text on dark background, no glow, no shadow, relying on contrast alone

subtitle.style: clean geometric sans-serif, matching nav link styling
subtitle.effects: none — uses the website's text-secondary color for visual hierarchy, clean and muted

text_overlay.hierarchy: headline in white is primary, subtitle in muted gray (#8A8F98) creates the same primary/secondary text hierarchy used throughout the website

ui_windows.type: main card panel — Cowork curriculum builder
ui_windows.style: white (#FFFFFF) filled rectangle with 1px solid border in rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px (--radius-md), very subtle shadow (0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)), flat and clean
ui_windows.details: central main card showing a Cowork interface for training design: at the top a small pill-shaped badge (border-radius 999px, 1px border) reading 'Trainingsplanung' with a gold dot (#FFD166). Below, a structured curriculum outline with numbered steps styled like the website's agenda-timeline component — small circles (36px, 2px border) containing step numbers, connected by a thin vertical line. Three steps visible: '1 — Lernziele definieren' (completed, circle border in #06D6A0), '2 — Interaktive Übungen erstellen' (in progress, circle border in #FFD166), '3 — Materialien generieren' (pending, circle border in #8A8F98). Clean 14px text, exactly matching the website's agenda-step layout

ui_windows.style: white filled rectangle, 1px solid border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px, flat card
ui_windows.details: an interactive quiz preview showing a sample question: a heading in 18px semibold (matching .card h3), below it a question text in 14px #8A8F98, and three answer options rendered as small white inner cards (6px radius, 1px border) — one highlighted with a left accent border in #06D6A0 indicating the correct answer. At the bottom a flat progress bar: thin rectangle (4px height, 6px radius) with left portion filled #06D6A0 and remainder in rgba(255,255,255,0.1), reading '3/10' in 12px #8A8F98. Represents Cowork's ability to generate interactive assessments and self-check exercises as artifacts

ui_windows.style: white filled rectangle, 1px solid border rgba(255,255,255,0.15), border-radius 12px, flat card
ui_windows.details: a horizontal learning path with 5 milestone nodes connected by a thin horizontal line (1px). Each node is a small circle (similar to the website's agenda-number style): the first three filled with #06D6A0 (completed modules), the fourth with #FFD166 (current module), the fifth unfilled with 1px #8A8F98 border (upcoming). Below each node a tiny label in 11px — 'Grundlagen', 'Methoden', 'Praxis', 'Vertiefung', 'Zertifikat'. Represents how Cowork can design structured learning journeys with clear progression

ui_windows.style: three overlapping white rectangles with 1px borders and 12px radius, stacked with slight offset (8px horizontal, 8px vertical), representing layered documents
ui_windows.details: the topmost document shows a miniature slide layout with a heading and a simple bar chart (flat colored bars in #118AB2, #FFD166, #06D6A0 — no gradients), the middle shows a worksheet with fill-in-the-blank lines and checkbox items, the bottom shows a handout document with text blocks and a sidebar. All rendered as flat white cards with fine borders. Represents Cowork's ability to generate polished training deliverables: presentation slides, participant worksheets, and formatted handouts — all from a single natural language prompt

icons.style: small circles (8-10px diameter) with a 2px solid border ring, matching the website's badge-dot pattern: #06D6A0 fill for completed, #FFD166 fill for active, #118AB2 fill for queued — no glow, simple flat dots
icons.details: 5 small status dots connected by thin 1px lines (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) to the main curriculum builder card, each with a tiny label in 11px #8A8F98 — 'Recherche' (research), 'Quiz-Erstellung' (quiz creation), 'Slides' (presentations), 'Handouts' (worksheets), 'Lernpfad' (learning path) — representing how Cowork's sub-agents work in parallel on different training components simultaneously
icons.position: distributed along the left and bottom edges of the main card panel

decorative.style: thin solid strokes (1px) in rgba(255,255,255,0.12), with small arrow tips, no gradient, no glow — matching the website's use of fine border lines for structural separation
decorative.details: clean straight paths with right-angle turns connecting the main curriculum builder card to the quiz artifact, learning path, and output stack — resembling a simple flowchart, showing the workflow from curriculum design → interactive content → deliverable materials

decorative.style: outline only in rgba(255,255,255,0.25), 1px stroke weight, matching the website's SVG icon style (20×20px viewBox, stroke-width 2, stroke-linecap round, stroke-linejoin round)
decorative.details: small symbols placed as subtle ambient elements between cards: a graduation cap (Weiterbildung), an open book (Lernmaterialien), a lightbulb (Lernziele), a checkmark-in-circle (Assessments), a group of three dots representing participants (Teilnehmer). Purely structural outlines, no fill, no glow

decorative.style: thin 1px white lines at 15% opacity forming a pentagon/hexagon shape, with a filled area in #118AB2 at 20% opacity and vertex dots in #FFD166
decorative.details: a small spider/radar chart showing skill levels across 5 axes (e.g. Kommunikation, Methodik, Fachwissen, Führung, Analyse), representing competency assessment and skill gap analysis that Cowork can visualize for training needs identification. Positioned as a floating element near the quiz card

decorative.style: pill-shaped badges (border-radius 999px) with 1px border and transparent fill, matching the website's .badge component exactly
decorative.details: four small tags floating near the output stack: '.pptx' (dot in #118AB2), '.docx' (dot in #06D6A0), '.xlsx' (dot in #EF476F), '.html' (dot in #FFD166). Font-size 11px, font-weight 500. The .html tag represents interactive artifacts that Cowork creates as standalone training tools

decorative.style: flat checkmark icons in #06D6A0, 1px stroke weight, inside small circles with 1px border — matching the website's agenda-number circle style
decorative.details: two or three small completion checkmarks scattered near completed elements, reinforcing the training progress theme. Simple, flat, no animation styling

composition.layout: headline 'Training und Weiterbildung' and subtitle 'Claude Cowork' at top center; main curriculum builder card positioned center-left as focal anchor; interactive quiz artifact card to the upper right; learning path visualization card as a horizontal bar element below the main card spanning center; training materials output stack at lower right; sub-agent dots distributed along left edge of main card; competency radar as floating element between quiz and learning path
composition.depth: subtle z-axis layering through shadow depth only. Text on topmost layer with no effects. Main card slightly forward with 2px shadow. Satellite cards at same depth with 1px shadows. Decorative elements flat in background. Minimal depth — flat design with barely-there shadows matching the website's aesthetic
composition.negative_space: generous space reserved at top for headline and subtitle (top 25%), wide breathing room between all cards (minimum 24px gaps matching the website's grid gap), dark background grid visible between panels

technical.text: Headline: Training und Weiterbildung | Subtitle: Claude Cowork — both in Switzer font, fully readable, high contrast against #073B4C background
technical.no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, stock photo elements, competitor logos, cluttered overlapping, terminal/command line interface, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, frosted glass, backdrop blur, glow effects, neon effects, gradient fills on surfaces, rounded blob shapes, organic shapes

color_palette.text_primary: #FFFFFF (white — inverted from the website's #111111 for dark background context)
color_palette.card_border: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15) (light border — adapted from the website's #eaeaea for dark background)
color_palette.accent: #FFD166 (golden yellow — the website's --accent, for active/in-progress states and CTA emphasis)
color_palette.info: #118AB2 (ocean blue — the website's --info, for informational elements and slide accents)
color_palette.success: #06D6A0 (mint — the website's --success, for completed states and correct answers)
color_palette.warning: #EF476F (coral pink — the website's --warning, sparingly for attention and .xlsx accent)
color_palette.surface: #fafafa (the website's --bg-surface, used inside card sub-elements like badge backgrounds)
color_palette.border_radius: 6px for small elements (--radius-sm), 12px for cards (--radius-md), 999px for pill badges
